findings.name: vision_clipped_content
findings.evidence: Both chart panel titles in the quality/cost section appear clipped at the left edge: the titles render as “uality Compliance Metrics” and “uality vs. Cost Tradeoff,” missing the leading “Q”.

findings.name: vision_clipped_content
findings.evidence: The two chart titles are visibly clipped in the mobile rendering, with the leading “Q” missing from each title.

findings.name: vision_clipped_content
findings.evidence: Both chart panel titles in the quality/cost section appear clipped at the left edge, showing “uality...” instead of “Quality...”.

findings.name: vision_clipped_content
findings.evidence: The chart titles are clipped in the mobile viewport; the leading “Q” is missing from each chart title.

findings.name: vision_unstyled_render
findings.evidence: The artifact appears to be rendered with browser-default styling: Times-like text, white background, plain list/heading layout, and no visible Birch card/grid/module styling across the full deep page.

findings.name: vision_unstyled_render
findings.evidence: The mobile deep render is also browser-default styled, with plain headings/text and no visible Birch layout or component styling. The horizontal scrollbar reinforces that the intended responsive styling is not applied.

findings.name: vision_unstyled_render
findings.evidence: The desktop viewport shows an unstyled default HTML render rather than the intended Birch artifact styling: plain white background, default fonts, and no cards/rails/component styling.

findings.name: vision_unstyled_render
findings.evidence: The mobile viewport is visibly unstyled with default browser typography and layout, and it shows horizontal overflow instead of a usable responsive Birch layout.
